title: They Live in Fear
writer: Ruth Nussbaum, Samuel Ornitz, Wilfrid H. Pettitt
actors: Otto Kruger, Clifford Severn, Pat Parrish
plot: After witnessing the killing of a professor in concentration camp Dachau, German student Paul emigrates to the USA, where an American fellow student endangers Paul's new American existence as well as the existence of his family wh...
